name: Shift Handover
description: Generates structured shift handover reports covering all ITSM activity during a shift period, ensuring continuity of operations across team rotations.

triggers.description: Activates when user mentions shift handover, end of shift, or team handoff
shift-auto-handover — Generates handover reports at standard shift boundaries (06:00, 14:00, 22:00)
shift-activity-digest — Compiles ITSM activity digest every 8 hours

actions.name: generate-handover-report
actions.description: Generate a comprehensive shift handover report covering incidents, changes, problems, and outstanding actions

inputs.name: team
inputs.description: Team or assignment group for the handover

inputs.name: includeCategories
inputs.description: ITSM categories to include (incidents, changes, problems, SLAs)

outputs.name: handoverReport
outputs.description: Structured handover report with all activity summaries

outputs.name: outstandingActions
outputs.description: List of actions requiring follow-up by incoming shift

actions.name: get-shift-activity
actions.description: Query all ITSM activity within a specified time window

inputs.name: endTime
inputs.description: End of the activity window (defaults to now)

outputs.name: incidents
outputs.description: Incidents created, updated, or resolved during the window

outputs.name: changes
outputs.description: Changes submitted, approved, or implemented during the window

outputs.name: problems
outputs.description: Problems created or updated during the window

actions.name: flag-handover-item
actions.description: Flag a specific item as requiring attention from the incoming shift

inputs.name: notes
inputs.description: Handover notes for the incoming team

actions.name: acknowledge-handover
actions.description: Incoming shift acknowledges receipt of the handover report

inputs.name: acknowledgedBy
inputs.description: Name or ID of the person acknowledging

crossPracticeIntegrations.description: Collects incident activity for handover summaries
Collects change activity and pending approvals for handover
Collects problem investigation updates for handover
Reports SLA breaches and at-risk items in handover
Summarizes monitoring alerts and events during shift

hitlControls.reason: Incoming shift must formally acknowledge receipt of handover
Active escalations must be explicitly accepted by incoming team

knowledgeSources.description: All ITSM record changes within the shift period
Alert and event data for the shift period
On-call rosters and shift rotation data
IT Operations channel messages during shift
